---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's missing or awkward today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. UI sketch / API shape welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Hardware, tailnet topology, or use case that informs the request
(no secrets / real IPs, please).
